title: Red Velvet Delight
description: A buttery, silky, indulgent Mediterranean dish featuring red food coloring for a touch of elegance and low-fat-friendly recipe.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup low-fat cream cheese
ingredients.notes: Use full-fat if preferred but it will make the recipe higher in fat.

ingredients.name: 3 cups red food coloring (optional)
ingredients.notes: Start with small amounts and adjust to taste.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup low-fat mayonnaise
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced by reduced-fat Greek yogurt for a thicker consistency.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon Dijon mustard
ingredients.notes: Optional, can be omitted for a smoother texture.

ingredients.name: 1 cup grated low-fat mozzarella cheese
ingredients.notes: Can use non-dairy alternatives if needed.

ingredients.name: Pinch of red pepper flakes (optional)
ingredients.notes: To give a slight kick to the dish, optional.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons finely chopped fresh herbs (thyme or parsley)

instructions: In a large bowl, mix the low-fat cream cheese with the beaten egg until smooth.
Add the red food coloring gradually and blend well to achieve the desired color. Start with very small amounts.
Stir in the mayonnaise, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, garlic powder, pinch of red pepper flakes (if using), and finely chopped herbs. Mix thoroughly.
Fold in the grated low-fat mozzarella cheese gently until just combined.
Pour the mixture into a prepared low-fat graham cracker crust and smooth the top with a spatula.
Refrigerate for at least 1 hour to set before serving.
